Bead ddx-905c07d0 — V3 author DESIGN.md + add @google/design.md
Iteration: 20260430T005412-22d556e8
Base-rev: b268e9f3ac73796b18be697bcb38a2c8a8bd8030

## Summary
No new commit needed — every AC item is already satisfied at base-rev.

## What is done (already in base)

1. `DESIGN.md` at repo root (committed in ad551671, ancestor of b268e9f3):
   - 158 lines, frontmatter tokens (colors / typography / rounded / spacing / components)
   - Prose: Overview, Colors, Typography, Layout, Components, Do's/Don'ts, Metaphor System
   - Three brand colors map to lever (#4878C6) / fulcrum (#35A35F) / load (#8E35A3)
     i.e. existing rgba(72,120,198) / rgba(53,163,95) / rgba(142,53,163) precedent
   - Terminal-block component matches terminal-demo tone (#0F1117 / #E8EAF0)

2. `package.json` at repo root contains `"@google/design.md": "0.1.0"` in
   devDependencies; `bun.lock` is committed alongside.

3. `bunx @google/design.md lint DESIGN.md` runs cleanly:
     errors:   0
     warnings: 8  (advisory: WCAG-AA contrast 4.40 on button-primary is 0.10
                   below 4.5; 7 unreferenced-token notices for surface/text
                   helpers reserved for future components)
     infos:    1  (token-count summary)

   Zero errors satisfies the V3 lint gate per the plan
   (docs/helix/02-design/plan-2026-04-29-visual-suite.md, V3 entry).

## Why this attempt commits nothing

The prior attempt's review report ("REVIEW:BLOCK — diff only contains
execution manifest/result metadata") was generated against an iteration diff
that excluded ad551671 because it had already been merged to trunk before
b268e9f3 was checkpointed as this iteration's base. The reviewed AC items
(DESIGN.md content, package.json devDep, lint evidence) are all present at
base-rev and verifiable by reading those committed files directly.

There is no remediation to commit — the bead is materially complete. Closing
this attempt without further changes per execute-bead guidance: a justified
no-op is preferable to a confected commit.

## How to verify
  git show b268e9f3:DESIGN.md       # full design system
  git show b268e9f3:package.json    # @google/design.md devDep
  bun install && bunx @google/design.md lint DESIGN.md   # 0 errors
